question: Which dish name is displayed on the title card at the beginning of the video? A. FENNEL SEEDS B. METHI PULAO C. CASHEWS D. GARAM MASALA
What is the numeric value for the tablespoons of oil indicated in the text overlay?
What is the color of the rectangular cutting board placed next to the stove during the cooking process? A. White B. Silver C. Green D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A stainless steel pressure cooker sits on a white stovetop while a hand pours oil and cashews into it. To the right, a green cutting board holds glass bowls containing chopped onions, tomatoes, and spices while a wooden spatula stirs the frying ingredients inside the pot. White text overlays appear near the bottom of the screen displaying words like fennel seeds.

question: Which of the previously seen kitchen tools is back on screen? A. Small glass bowl containing white cashew nuts B. Wooden spatula with a teal silicone tip C. White square dish containing yellow powder D. White ceramic ramekin containing diced potatoes

Which combination of serving vessel and cooking vessel is shown in the video? A. Silver oval bowl and glass bowl B. Green cutting board and glass bowl C. Silver oval bowl and pressure cooker D. Green cutting board and pressure cooker
In the title sequence (chunks 1-3), where is the text 'METHI PULAO' positioned on the screen? A. On the left side B. On the right side C. In the center D. At the bottom
During the cooking process (chunks 5-9), where is the green cutting board positioned relative to the pressure cooker? A. On the left side B. On the right side C. In the center D. At the bottom
